'''banono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyphometer|kyphometer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyphometer|kyphometer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| banono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæneneth|bæneneth]] || [[word:bænenej|bænenej]] || [[word:bænenesh|bænenesh]] || [[word:bænene|bænene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:banononoth|banononoth]] || [[word:banononoj|banononoj]] || [[word:banononosh|banononosh]] || [[word:banonono|banonono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:banonoth|banonoth]] || [[word:banonoj|banonoj]] || [[word:banonosh|banonosh]] || [[word:banono|banono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:banofnoth|banofnoth]] || [[word:banofnoj|banofnoj]] || [[word:banofnosh|banofnosh]] || [[word:banofnof|banofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:banonotho|banonotho]] || [[word:banonojo|banonojo]] || [[word:banonosho|banonosho]] || [[word:banonoko|banonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:banonoth|banonoth]] || [[word:banonoj|banonoj]] || [[word:banonosh|banonosh]] || [[word:banono|banono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:banonothol|banonothol]] || [[word:banonojol|banonojol]] || [[word:banonoshol|banonoshol]] || [[word:banonokol|banonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:banonothotho|banonothotho]] || [[word:banonojojo|banonojojo]] || [[word:banonoshosho|banonoshosho]] || [[word:banonoko|banonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:banonothon|banonothon]] || [[word:banonojon|banonojon]] || [[word:banonoshon|banonoshon]] || [[word:banonokon|banonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:banonothoro|banonothoro]] || [[word:banonojoro|banonojoro]] || [[word:banonoshoro|banonoshoro]] || [[word:banonokoro|banonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
